---
title: "Remote Sensing Dataset of Global PV Station"
description: "This geospatial dataset represents the most comprehensive global PV mapping product, offering the global spatial coverage, the highest resolution, and the most up-to-date information developed by our team at SIAT, CAS"
author: "Xiaopeng Zeng"
date: "2025-12-03"
categories: [dataset]
image: "figure1.JPG"
#css: /custom.css
#draft: true
---

[![](figure1.JPG){width="90%"}](https://github.com/SUNNYTREE-LAB/Fusion_PV_Mapping)

[Click to download](https://github.com/SUNNYTREE-LAB/Fusion_PV_Mapping)
<!--Include social share buttons-->

{{< include /files/includes/_socialshare.qmd >}}
